experience.title: Engineering Manager
experience.description:
Head of Transaction Risk ML

- I run multiple Machine Learning and Backend engineering teams at Stripe’s Risk Tech org. 
- My Eng org (20 ppl) is responsible for Stripe's transaction risk protections, payment fraud protections, card testing protections, and Radar SaaS products, building on top of cutting edge ML technologies and the underlying scalable distributed systems

experience.title: Engineering Manager
experience.description:
* Engineering Manager, Head of Infra Capacity (Jul 2020 - Aug 2021)
I run the Capacity, Efficiency and Infra Reliability engineering teams at Lyft.

* Engineering Manager, Self-Driving Division (Aug 2019 - Jul 2020)
Managed the Scenarios team at Lyft’s self-driving division with a group of talented engineers. Our mission is to model and organize the world's dynamic driving situations and make this information easily accessible to accelerate and evaluate self-driving developments.  

* Engineering Manager, Lyft Rideshare (Jan 2017 – Aug 2019)
Ran the Backend and Web Portal Engineering teams for Lyft Business.
Join us building the world-class Business Travel products and Transportation experience!

* Senior Software Engineer (Mar 2016 – Jan 2017)
Research engineer at Data Infrastructure
- Hadoop/Hive infra
- Data ingestion
- ETL pipeline
- Machine learning infra

projects.name: Twitter Ads Event Targeting
projects.description: Millions of people rely on Twitter to discover and engage with a variety of live events. Whether it’s a presidential election, Coachella, Mother’s Day or the Super Bowl, if it’s happening in the world, it’s happening on Twitter. Starting today, advertisers will be able to reach audiences interested in these events with a new feature called event targeting.

projects.name: All-pairs similarity via DIMSUM
projects.description: We have developed a new efficient algorithm to solve the similarity join called “Dimension Independent Matrix Square using MapReduce,” or DIMSUM for short, which made one of our most expensive computations 40% more efficient.
